scene_description: A collection of toy grocery items, including boxes, cans, and bottles, is placed inside and around a cardboard box resting on a gray couch.

candidates.rationale: Two identical cylindrical cans labeled 'CORN' are stacked vertically near the center of the items inside the box.

scene_description: A collection of various toy grocery items, including cans, boxes, and bottles, is arranged on a gray upholstered surface.

candidates.rationale: There are five small cylindrical cans (pineapple, peaches, soup, tuna, corn) and two large tomato sauce cans stacked on the right.

scene_description: A collection of groceries, including canned goods, boxes, and bottles, sits inside plastic shopping bags on a dark surface in front of a window with blinds.

candidates.rationale: Two small, identical rectangular cartons labeled Orange Juice are visible standing upright on the left side of the grocery pile.

scene_description: A collection of miniature grocery items is displayed on a dark shelf and inside an open drawer.

candidates.rationale: Two identical red and purple boxes labeled 'Raisins' are clearly visible inside the open drawer.

scene_description: A cardboard box is filled with various toy grocery products, including bottles, boxes, and cans.

candidates.rationale: There is one smaller red squeeze bottle near the top center and one larger red squeeze bottle below it, both clearly labeled 'Tomato Ketchup'.
There are two rectangular cardboard boxes labeled 'RAISINS' with a purple design, located on the left side of the container.

scene_description: A collection of miniature grocery items, including boxes, cans, and bottles, are arranged on a gray upholstered surface.

candidates.rationale: Two identical plastic bottles labeled 'MAYO' with blue caps are visible, one in the upper center and one near the lower right corner.

scene_description: A collection of miniature grocery items, including boxes, cans, and bottles, is gathered in a plastic bag on a gray couch.

candidates.rationale: Two identical red squeezable bottles labeled 'BBQ Sauce' are visible near the center-right.

scene_description: A kitchen counter and cabinets are visible, featuring various packaged foods, dishware, and appliances.

candidates.rationale: One Corny box is located on the counter next to the coffee maker, and another is on the bottom shelf of the open cabinet.
